firmware.title: Tcard_CK8n-H931ABC-U-GL-240702V388
firmware.description:
Caution! This update may crash rooted devices.
Please plug in charger to OTA upgrade when power is lower than 50%.
Update Version: CK8n-H931ABC-U-GL-240702V388
Optimized Issues:
1. Upgraded the Android version from Android 13 to Android 14.
2. Upgraded the HiOS version from HiOS 13.0.0 to HiOS 14.0.
3. Upgraded/added some special features that users are concerned about and optimized them for more apps to improve the overall experience. These features include but are not limited to Dynamic Port, Game Assistant Panel, Clock/Weather widgets, Split-screen, Floating Windows, App Twin, AI Gallery, Clipper, Social Turbo, Large Font, Wi-Fi Hotspot Management, Find My, and Anti-theft.
Reminding:
1. Optimized system stability and performance while fixing other issues.
2. Visit the TECNO SPOT forum (TECNO SPOT) for more information.

firmware.title: CK8n-H931ABC-U-GL-240702V388-241029V472_20241030172520
firmware.description:
Please plug in charger to OTA upgrade when power is lower than 50%.

Update Version:
CK8n-H931ABC-U-GL-241029V472

Changed Functions:
1. Updated Google Security Patch to October 5, 2024.
2. Updated Ella to V3.9.

Fixed Issues:
1. Optimized for the lagging issue occurred when users swipe on the interface of YouTube or Facebook.
2. Optimized for the lagging issue occurred when users pinch in with two fingers and swipe on the main interface of AI Gallery.
3. Fixed the issue of crash occurred when users tap Notifications on Lock Screen (the third-level menu in Settings).
4. Fixed the issue that the screen is stuck but with audio output after brightness adjustment during AV1 1080P video playback on Netflix.

Reminding:
1. Optimized system stability and performance while fixing other issues.
2. Visit the TECNO SPOT forum (https://tspot.tecno.com) for more information.
